steps.title: Use the conversion ratio
steps.content: Since $180^\circ=\pi$ radians, multiply a degree measure by $\frac{\pi}{180}$ to convert it to radians.

steps.title: Convert the angle
steps.content:
Apply the conversion to $60^\circ$, then simplify the fraction by dividing by $60$.
$60^\circ\cdot \frac{\pi}{180}=\frac{60\pi}{180}=\frac{\pi}{3}$
This is the same as $\frac{1}{3}\pi$.
The answer is D.
